typography.headings: Cormorant Garamond (Serif) - Elegant, classic editorial feel.
typography.body: Outfit or Manrope (Sans-serif) - Clean, modern legibility.
rules: Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, Open Sans for headings.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Tint neutral grays with blue.
Use Jaguar Gold (#C5A059) for subtle accents and important CTAs.
Royal Blue (#114488) acts as the dominant brand pillar.

shadows: Ambient, diffused shadows for editorial images.
Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use 1px borders instead of shadows for standard containers.
surfaces: Use 'Crystal Glass' (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with 1px border-white/40) for sticky navigation.
Use 'Grid Borders' for admin/data-heavy sections: border-collapse, subtle borders on right and bottom.
textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay in hero section to replicate newsprint texture.
Tasteful cheetah/jaguar print texture overlay at low opacity (10-15%) inside specific accent cards or banner backgrounds.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-16. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
grids: Public Pages: 'The Tetris Grid' (Asymmetric). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8).
Admin Panel: 'High Density Grid'. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use Shadcn tables for tracking.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Smooth hover states.
components.navigation: Sticky header with glassmorphism. Must have logo, 3-5 links, and CTA button. Not hidden on desktop.
components.forms: Shadcn UI custom styled. Sharp 1px borders, subtle focus rings in primary blue.
components.charts: Shadcn UI charts or rechart for scoring rubric data visualization.
components.data_tables: Shadcn tables for admin tracking. Dense layout with thin lines.

motion.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow for cards. Lighter hue for button hovers.
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g. transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). Do NOT use 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use text shadow over images.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus states with 2px ring in primary color.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
accessibility.theme: Support Light mode primarily, but provide a Dark mode toggle.

awards_hero.description: Close-up of shiny golden star trophies. Use for Hero or Landing overview.

awards_statuettes.description: Close-up of multiple golden award statuettes. Use for Categories or Winners overview.

editorial_reading.description: Woman reading a newspaper. Use for Editorial/About Blueprint section.

cheetah_texture.description: Black and brown leopard/cheetah print. Use for subtle background accents or borders at very low opacity.

newspaper_text.description: Newspaper texture text. Use for 'Past Themes' or 'Guidebook' hero background.

media.icons: Use lucide-react (default) or install @phosphor-icons/react for elegant duotone icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sophisticated editorial layout. Think Vogue meets University Newspaper.
Ensure 'The Blueprint' brand is prominent using Royal Blue (#114488) and Jaguar Gold (#C5A059).
Do NOT use typical generic SaaS layouts for public pages. Rely on asymmetric typography and large imagery.
Use 'react-fast-marquee' for a slow, elegant editorial ribbon separating sections.
For the admin side (tracking, rubric, timelines), switch to a dense, functional dashboard mode using Shadcn UI components.
Implement a PDF export/print-friendly style (e.g., hiding navigation and using print-specific CSS rules).
Implement JWT admin auth flow (can be mocked for frontend MVP).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop. Avoid purely symmetrical, centered layouts unless intentionally editorial.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). It disrupts reading flow.
NEVER use emoji characters (🤖, etc.) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, staggered entrance).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
